AdminLayout : ClientLayout; 30 const isAdmin = useAdmin || user?.role === "admin"; 31 32 const [selectedClientId, setSelectedClientId] = useState("all"); 33 const [triggerDialog, setTriggerDialog] = useState(null); 34 const [sequenceDialog, setSequenceDialog] = useState(null); 35 const [broadcastDialog, setBroadcastDialog] = useState(false); 36 const [selectedLeads, setSelectedLeads] = useState([]); 37 38 const { data: clients = [] } = useQuery({ 39 queryKey: ["/api/clients"], 40 enabled: isAdmin, 41 }); 42 43 const activeClientId = isAdmin ? (selectedClientId === "all" ? "" : selectedClientId) : (user?.id || ""); 44 45 const { data: leads = [] } = useQuery({ 46 queryKey: ["/api/dm/leads", activeClientId], 47 queryFn: () => fetch(`/api/dm/leads${activeClientId ? `?clientId=${activeClientId}` : ""}`).then(r => r.json()), 48 }); 49 50 const { data: triggers = [] } = useQuery({ 51 queryKey: ["/api/dm/triggers", activeClientId], 52 queryFn: () => fetch(`/api/dm/triggers${activeClientId ? `?userId=${activeClientId}` : ""}`).then(r => r.json()), 53 }); 54 55 const { data: sequences = [] } = useQuery({ 56 queryKey: ["/api/dm/sequences", activeClientId], 57 queryFn: () => fetch(`/api/dm/sequences${activeClientId ? `?userId=${activeClientId}` : ""}`).then(r => r.json()), 58 }); 59 60 const stats = { 61 totalLeads: leads.length, 62 newLeads: leads.filter((l: any) => l.status === "new").length, 63 activeTriggers: triggers.filter((t: any) => t.isActive).length, 64 activeSequences: sequences.filter((s: any) => s.isActive).length, 65 totalEnrollments: sequences.reduce((sum: number, s: any) => sum + (s.enrollmentCount || 0), 0), 66 totalTriggerFires: triggers.reduce((sum: number, t: any) => sum + (t.triggerCount || 0), 0), 67 }; 68 69 return ( 70 71
